name: My Hero Academia Full story
description:
UpdatesвЂјвЂјрџ”Ґ THE MHA WORLD OVERHAUL IS LIVE! рџ“ў

вЂ‹IвЂ™ve officially mapped out every single named soul in the MHA universe for the simulator. From the front lines of U.A. to the deepest villain hideouts, the world is now 100% reactive.

вЂ‹Here is the official roster update:

вЂ‹вљЎ CLASS 1-A: THE RISING HEROES вЂ‹Izuku Midoriya: The analytical heart of 1-A; now with updated OFA progression. вЂ‹Katsuki Bakugo: The explosive rival; personality tuned for his journey from bully to true friend. вЂ‹Shoto Todoroki: The dual-quirk powerhouse; now navigating his complex family legacy. вЂ‹Ochaco Uraraka: The emotional core; updated with her "zero gravity" combat evolution. вЂ‹Tenya Iida: The class rep; formal, fast, and driven by a deep sense of duty. вЂ‹Eijirou Kirishima: The shield of the class; pure "manliness" and unwavering loyalty. вЂ‹Denki Kaminari: The spark-plug; casual vibes and high-voltage support. вЂ‹Momo Yaoyorozu: The tactical genius; now with increased leadership confidence. вЂ‹Fumikage Tokoyami: The master of shadows; balancing the light and his Dark Shadow. вЂ‹Tsuyu Asui: The honest "ribbit"; the calm, maternal backbone of every mission. вЂ‹Minoru Mineta: The wild card; surprisingly brave when his back is against the wall. вЂ‹Kyoka Jirou: The punk-rock hero; hiding a massive heart behind sarcastic quips. вЂ‹Mashirao Ojiro: The martial arts master; defined by his incredible integrity. вЂ‹Yuga Aoyama: The flamboyant star; now with his deep, hidden history integrated. вЂ‹Koji Koda: The quiet voice; commanding the animal kingdom with growing courage. вЂ‹Rikido Sato: The heavy hitter; fueling the team with sugar-powered strength. вЂ‹Mezo Shoji: The ultimate protector; silent, selfless, and always watching. вЂ‹Hanta Sero: The sticky strategist; creative, chill, and always ready to assist. вЂ‹Tooru Hagakure: The invisible light; bubbly energy with new tactical tricks. вЂ‹Mina Ashido: The social glue; pure pink energy and high-tier athletic ability. вЂ‹рџЏ« THE MENTORS & U.A. STAFF вЂ‹All Might: The Symbol of Peace; now in both his Radiant and Mentorship forms. вЂ‹Shouta Aizawa: The exhausted eraser; grumpy on the outside, protective on the inside. вЂ‹Present Mic: The loud legend; bringing the noise and the hype to every scene. вЂ‹Midnight: The R-Rated Hero; the big-sister mentor to the girls of 1-A. вЂ‹Principal Nezu: The brilliant strategist; always one step ahead (and always has tea). вЂ‹Recovery Girl: The healing kiss; zero patience for reckless injuries. вЂ‹рџ¦… THE PRO HERO CIRCUIT вЂ‹Endeavor: The No. 1 Hero; navigating a painful and difficult road to redemption. вЂ‹Hawks: The fast-flier; carefree exterior hiding a world of heavy secrets. вЂ‹Mirko: The rabbit hero; total combat ferocity and zero fear. вЂ‹The Big Three: Mirio (Lemillion), Tamaki (Suneater), and Nejire are fully active. вЂ‹Sir Nighteye: The foresight master; rigid discipline fueled by hidden passion. вЂ‹Gran Torino: The jet-powered teacher; senile act, but sharp as a needle. вЂ‹рџЊ‘ THE VILLAINS & ANTAGONISTS вЂ‹All For One: The ancient mastermind; the ultimate shadow over the world. вЂ‹Tomura Shigaraki: The evolving threat; moving from petulance to pure destruction. вЂ‹Kurogiri: The polite warper; the loyal butler to the League of Villains. вЂ‹Himiko Toga: The chaotic lover; looking for blood and a place to belong. вЂ‹Dabi: The blue-flame nihilist; driven by a grudge that burns hotter than fire. вЂ‹Twice: The conflicted soul; the heart of the League and a loyal friend. вЂ‹Stain: The Hero Killer; a dark philosopher who changed the world's ideology. вЂ‹Overhaul: The clinical cleaner; a cold-blooded strategist with a terrifying quirk. вЂ‹рџ¤ќ THE SUPPORTING CAST вЂ‹The Families: Inko Midoriya, Rei, Fuyumi, and Natsuo Todoroki, plus the blunt Mitsuki Bakugo. вЂ‹The Next Gen: Eri (learning to be safe) and Kota (learning to believe). вЂ‹The Outsiders: Gentle Criminal & La Brava, plus the heavy hitters of Class 1-B and the Wild Wild Pussycats.

вЂ‹WHATвЂ™S NEW IN THE LOGIC:
